response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analysis identified promotional talk from 00:00 to 04:01 and a song performance from 04:01 to 04:59. 2. Song title 'ray' and composer 'Fujiwara Motoo' were identified from on-screen text. 3. Used search query 'ray BUMP OF CHICKEN lyrics' to find the official lyrics. 4. Formatted lyrics and translation for the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A promotional video featuring Oozora Subaru introducing her 7th-anniversary live goods, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru talks about her 7th-anniversary live event merchandise, including a rubber mat, card sleeves, a card case, and a plush keychain.
Oozora Subaru performs a vocal cover of 'ray'. The song title and composer (Fujiwara Motoo) are shown on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
お別れしたのはもっと 前の事だったような
悲しい光は封じ込めて 踵すり減らしたんだ
君といた時は見えた 今は見えなくなった
透明な彗星をぼんやりと
でもそれだけ探している

しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよ その時だけのメロディーを
寂しくなんかなかったよ ちゃんと寂しくなれたから
いつまでどこまでなんて 正常か異常かなんて
考える暇も無い程 歩くのは大変だ
楽しい方がずっといいよ ごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だ あの痛みは 忘れたって消えやしない

理想で作った道を 現実が塗り替えていくよ
思い出はその軌跡の上で 輝きになって残っている
お別れしたのは何で 何のためだったんだろうな
悲しい光が僕の影を 前に長く伸ばしている
時々熱が出るよ 時間がある時眠るよ
夢だと解るその中で 君と会ってからまた行こう
晴天とはほど遠い 終わらない暗闇にも
星を思い浮かべたなら すぐ銀河の中だ

あまり泣かなくなっても 靴を新しくしても
大丈夫だ あの痛みは 忘れたって消えやしない
伝えたかった事が きっとあったんだろうな
恐らくありきたりなんだろうけど
こんなにもお別れした事は
出会った事と繋がっている

あの透明な彗星は 透明だから無くならない
◯×△どれかなんて 皆と比べてどうかなんて
確かめる間も無い程 生きるのは最高だ
あまり泣かなくなっても ごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だ あの痛みは 忘れたって消えやしない
大丈夫だ この光の始まりには 君がいる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Saying goodbye was something that happened a long time ago
I sealed away the sad light and wore down my heels
I could see it when I was with you, but now I can no longer see it
I vaguely look for that transparent comet
But that's all I'm searching for

I often sang songs, melodies for just that moment
I wasn't lonely, because I was able to be lonely properly
Until when? To where? Is it normal or abnormal?
I don't even have time to think about that, walking is hard
It's much better to have fun, I'll keep laughing while faking it
It's alright, that pain won't disappear even if you forget it

Reality repaints the path made by ideals
The memories remain on that trajectory, becoming a brilliance
Why did we say goodbye? What was it for?
A sad light stretches my shadow out in front of me
Sometimes I get a fever, I sleep when I have time
In that dream, I know it's a dream, let's go again after I meet you
Even in the endless darkness far from clear skies
If I imagine stars, I'm already in the galaxy

Even if I don't cry much anymore, even if I get new shoes
It's alright, that pain won't disappear even if you forget it
There must have been things I wanted to tell you
They were probably cliché, but
The fact that we said goodbye
Is connected to the fact that we met

That transparent comet won't disappear because it's transparent
Is it a circle, cross, or triangle? How do I compare with everyone?
I don't even have time to check that, living is the best
Even if I don't cry much anymore, I'll keep laughing while faking it
It's alright, that pain won't disappear even if you forget it
It's alright, you are at the beginning of this light
